reviews.comment:
Malisimo servicio paro enemergenciay me querian obligar a correr mi vehiculo sin importarle que estaba en llanta y la empleada claudia nardini le reclamo a mi hija que saque ya la camioneta una verguenza de servicio por que yo estacione enla senda peatonal para no entorpecer el transito realmente no se lo recomiendo a nadie pesimo servicio y muy poco solidario jamas se lo recomendaria a nadie al pesimo servicio de esa estacion de servicio que de servicio CERO

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I had an emergency stop and they tried to force me to move my vehicle, even though I had a flat tire. The employee, Claudia Nardini, told my daughter to move the truck immediately. It was a disgraceful service because I had parked in the crosswalk to avoid obstructing traffic. I really wouldn't recommend it to anyone. The service is awful and completely unhelpful. I would never recommend this gas station to anyone. Its service is ZERO.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMXJiNEJnEAE
